# presenterOverlayPrivacyAlertSetting

**Instance Property**

A value indicating if alerts appear to presenters while using Presenter Overlay.

## Declaration

```swift
var presenterOverlayPrivacyAlertSetting: SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.screencapturekit/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting/system].

## Notifying presenters

- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting**: Configures how to present streaming notifications to a streamer of Presenter Overlay.
